functional_requirements: Describe one observable behavior and its timing tolerance.
acceptance_criteria: Static check has no BLOCKER or ERROR.
Target compiler reports 0 errors and 0 warnings.
BIN, HEX and MAP hashes are recorded.
Required hardware observations are recorded as evidence, not assumptions.
allowed_changes: Create new source files under the task workspace.
forbidden_changes: Do not modify verified baselines or existing hardware evidence.
Do not flash while board-critical inputs remain unresolved.
unresolved_inputs: Target chip revision and board profile remain unresolved in this example.
